title: Barbacenia rodriguesii
taxonomy: Barbacenia rodriguesii is a species of plant in the family Velloziaceae. It is native to Brazil and is part of the genus Barbacenia. The genus Barbacenia is a group of flowering plants that are commonly known as "pinhão" in Portuguese. Barbacenia rodriguesii is a type of terrestrial plant that produces small white flowers. It is classified as an evergreen, meaning it retains its leaves year-round.

intro: Barbacenia rodriguesii, also known as rodriquez's cobra lily, is a plant species belonging to the family Velloziaceae. This plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties.
